{"ok":true,"status":"ok","message":"","error_code":null,"schema_id":"tool.view.v1","schema_version":1,"data":{"path":"/Users/solosolar/Desktop/Code Projects/aicoder/BetaR2/IDE/CopilotChatToolCore/README.md","content":"1|# Copilot Chat Tool Core
2|
3|This directory contains exact copies of all Copilot Chat tools (except `apply_patch` which has been implemented separately) along with detailed investigation reports of the agentic system.
4|
5|## Structure
6|
7|### AgentCore/
8|Detailed documentation of Copilot's agentic system architecture:
9|
10|- **AgenticSystemOverview.md**: High-level overview of the agent system
11|- **RequestHandling.md**: How requests are processed and routed
12|- **ModeSwitching.md**: Different modes and when they're activated
13|- **AgentTypes.md**: Different agent types and their capabilities
14|- **ToolCallingLoop.md**: The core tool execution loop mechanism
15|- **Subagents.md**: How subagents work and are coordinated
16|- **ExampleResponse.md**: Complete example of a request-response cycle
17|
18|### Tools/
19|Complete implementations of all Copilot Chat tools:
20|
21|#### Core Tools
22|- `codebaseTool.tsx` - Semantic code search
23|- `readFileTool.tsx` - File reading with intelligent chunking
24|- `createFileTool.tsx` - File creation
25|- `replaceStringTool.tsx` - String replacement with context matching
26|- `multiReplaceStringTool.tsx` - Multiple string replacements
27|- `listDirTool.tsx` - Directory listing
28|- `createDirectoryTool.tsx` - Directory creation
29|
30|#### Search & Discovery
31|- `findFilesTool.tsx` - File finding with patterns
32|- `findTextInFilesTool.tsx` - Text search across files
33|- `searchWorkspaceSymbolsTool.tsx` - Symbol search in workspace
34|- `usagesTool.tsx` - Find usages of symbols
35|
36|#### Development Workflow
37|- `getErrorsTool.tsx` - Error and diagnostic retrieval
38|- `scmChangesTool.tsx` - Git change tracking
39|- `manageTodoListTool.tsx` - TODO list management
40|- `memoryTool.tsx` - Conversation memory management
41|
42|#### Testing
43|- `testFailureTool.tsx` - Test failure analysis
44|- `findTestsFilesTool.tsx` - Test file discovery
45|
46|#### Jupyter Notebook
47|- `newNotebookTool.tsx` - Notebook creation
48|- `editNotebookTool.tsx` - Notebook editing
49|- `runNotebookCellTool.tsx` - Cell execution
50|- `notebookSummaryTool.tsx` - Notebook analysis
51|- `getNotebookCellOutputTool.tsx` - Cell output retrieval
52|
53|#### VS Code Integration
54|- `vscodeAPITool.ts` - VS Code API documentation
55|- `vscodeCmdTool.tsx` - VS Code command execution
56|- `installExtensionTool.tsx` - Extension management
57|- `getSearchViewResultsTool.tsx` - Search view integration
58|
59|#### Web & External
60|- `githubRepoTool.tsx` - GitHub repository operations
61|- `simpleBrowserTool.tsx` - Web browsing
62|- `fetchWebPageTool.tsx` - Web page fetching
63|
64|#### Specialized
65|- `docTool.tsx` - Documentation generation
66|- `readProjectStructureTool.ts` - Project structure analysis
67|- `toolReplayTool.tsx` - Tool execution replay
68|- `searchSubagentTool.ts` - Search subagent spawning
69|
70|### Common/
71|Shared infrastructure:
72|- `toolsRegistry.ts` - Tool registration system
73|- `toolNames.ts` - Tool name definitions and categories
74|- `toolUtils.ts` - Utility functions
75|- `toolsService.ts` - Tool service management
76|
77|## Implementation Notes
78|
79|These tools are copied directly from the VS Code Copilot Chat extension and will require adaptation to work in the AI Coding IDE environment:
80|
81|1. **VS Code API Dependencies**: Replace `vscode` imports with IDE equivalents
82|2. **Extension Context**: Adapt to the IDE's plugin architecture
83|3. **UI Integration**: Update UI rendering for the IDE's interface
84|4. **Authentication**: Handle API keys and authentication differently
85|5. **File System**: Use the IDE's file system abstraction
86|
87|## Agentic System Investigation
88|
89|The AgentCore documentation provides comprehensive analysis of:
90|
91|- **Request Processing**: How user queries are analyzed and routed
92|- **Mode Switching**: When and why the system changes operational modes
93|- **Tool Calling Loop**: The iterative process of tool execution and decision making
94|- **Subagent Coordination**: How specialized agents are spawned and managed
95|- **Response Generation**: How final answers are constructed from tool results
96|
97|## Next Steps
98|
99|1. **Adaptation**: Modify each tool to work with the IDE's APIs
100|2. **Integration**: Connect tools to the IDE's tool execution system
101|3. **Testing**: Validate tool functionality in the IDE environment
102|4. **Optimization**: Tune performance for the IDE's use cases
103|
104|## Key Findings from Investigation
105|
106|- Copilot uses a sophisticated multi-agent system with specialized agents for different tasks
107|- The tool calling loop enables complex multi-step operations through iterative tool execution
108|- Subagents allow for parallel processing and domain specialization
109|- Context management and mode switching are critical for efficient operation
110|- The system balances between providing comprehensive results and maintaining responsiveness</content>

Your project is **"Auaci"** - an **AI-powered coding IDE** built with Electron. Here's what it comprises:

### Core Application (`src/main/`)
A full IDE with:
- **Directory viewer** - File/folder navigation sidebar
- **Monaco editor** - The same editor VS Code uses
- **AI Chat interface** - Chat panel for AI-assisted coding (styled like Copilot Chat)
- **Embedded terminal** - Built-in terminal support

### AI Integration (`C05LocalAi/`)
Local AI assistant with support for:
- Multiple LLM providers (NVIDIA, OpenRouter, Poe)
- Session management (calendar-assistant, test-app)
- Testing protocols

### Copilot Chat Study (`CopilotChatToolCore/`)
A reverse-engineered copy of VS Code's Copilot Chat extension containing:
- **AgentCore docs** - Architecture docs on how Copilot handles requests, mode switching, subagents, and tool execution
- **Tool implementations** - File operations, search, diagnostics, notebooks, GitHub integration, web browsing
- **Common utilities** - Tool registry, service management

### VS Code Extension (`vscode-copilot-chat/`)
The actual VS Code Copilot Chat extension source code

In short: **You're building your own AI coding IDE that replicates VS Code + Copilot functionality**, with a local AI backend integration.
